name: Miquel y Costas & Miquel, S.A.
summary: Miquel y Costas & Miquel, S.A., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells fine and specialty lightweight papers in Spain. The company offers papers for the cigarette industry; printing, rolling, and specialty papers; and specialty textile pulps for industrial uses, as well as colored papers and cardboards. It also exports its products. Miquel y Costas & Miquel, S.A. was founded in 1725 and is headquartered in Barcelona, Spain.
